# Koi UI — full LLM reference

Generated from component docs + TypeScript props. Prefer this file when implementing UI with `@koi-ui/core`.

## Global conventions

1. `import { X } from '@koi-ui/core'`
2. Root: `<KoiProvider>…</KoiProvider>`
3. Styles: `@import "@koi-ui/core/styles.css";`
4. Use semantic `color="error"` (never `danger` / `destructive`)
5. Surface components: `color` × `variant` (`solid` | `soft` | `outline` | `dash` | `ghost` | `link` where applicable)
6. Choosing similar components:
   - `InputNumber` = editable number field; `Stepper` = tap/hold quantity control
   - `Spin` = inline loading; `Loading` = fullscreen/blocking overlay
   - `Steps` = wizard progress; `Stepper` = numeric ±
   - `Modal` = adaptive dialog; `Popup` = compact centered dialog

## Button

Chinese name: 按钮

`color` sets the semantic tone; `variant` sets the surface style.

Category: General / 通用

```ts
import { Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/button | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/button

### Props

- `loading` (optional): `boolean`
- `responsiveSize` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true` — Shrink one size step on mobile breakpoints.
- `variant` (optional): `"solid" | "soft" | "outline" | "dash" | "ghost" | "link"`, default: `solid`
- `color` (optional): `"neutral" | "primary" | "secondary" | "info" | "success" | "warning" | "error"`, default: `neutral`
- `size` (optional): `"md" | "xs" | "sm" | "lg" | "xl"`, default: `md`
- `shape` (optional): `"default" | "square" | "circle"`, default: `default`
- `block` (optional): `boolean`
- `wide` (optional): `boolean`
- `active` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Button, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space wrap>
    <Button>Default</Button>
    <Button color="secondary">Secondary</Button>
    <Button color="primary">Primary</Button>
  </Space>
);
```

```tsx
import { Button, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space wrap>
    <Button color="neutral">Neutral</Button>
    <Button color="primary">Primary</Button>
    <Button color="secondary">Secondary</Button>
    <Button color="info">Info</Button>
    <Button color="success">Success</Button>
    <Button color="warning">Warning</Button>
    <Button color="error">Error</Button>
  </Space>
);
```

## Icon

Chinese name: 图标

Icon component from @koi-ui/core

Category: General / 通用

```ts
import { Icon } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/icon | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/icon

### Props

- `name` (required): `IconName`
- `size` (optional): `"md" | "xs" | "sm" | "lg" | "xl"`

## Typography

Chinese name: 排版

Typography component from @koi-ui/core

Category: General / 通用

```ts
import { Typography } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/typography | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/typography

### Props

- `level` (optional): `1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6`, default: `1`
- `ellipsis` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Typography } from '@koi-ui/core';
const { Title, Text, Paragraph, Link } = Typography;
export default () => (
  <div className="space-y-2">
    <Title level={3}>Title</Title>
    <Paragraph>Paragraph for longer body copy.</Paragraph>
    <Text type="secondary">Secondary text</Text>
    {' · '}
    <Link href="#">Link</Link>
  </div>
);
```

```tsx
import { Typography } from '@koi-ui/core';
const { Title } = Typography;
export default () => (
  <div className="space-y-2">
    <Title level={1}>H1 Title</Title>
    <Title level={2}>H2 Title</Title>
    <Title level={3}>H3 Title</Title>
    <Title level={4}>H4 Title</Title>
    <Title level={5}>H5 Title</Title>
    <Title level={6}>H6 Title</Title>
    <Title level={4} ellipsis className="max-w-48">
      Long titles truncate with an ellipsis when overflowing
    </Title>
  </div>
);
```

## Divider

Chinese name: 分割线

Divider component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Layout / 布局

```ts
import { Divider } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/divider | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/divider

### Props

- `orientationMargin` (optional): `string | number`
- `type` (optional): `"horizontal" | "vertical"`, default: `horizontal`
- `dashed` (optional): `boolean`
- `plain` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Divider } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <div>
    <p>Content above</p>
    <Divider />
    <p>Content below</p>
  </div>
);
```

```tsx
import { Divider } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <div className="space-y-4">
    <Divider plain={false}>Section</Divider>
    <Divider plain={false} dashed>Dashed section</Divider>
  </div>
);
```

## Grid

Chinese name: 栅格

Grid component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Layout / 布局

```ts
import { Grid } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/grid | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/grid

### Props

- `gutter` (optional): `"md" | "none" | "sm" | "lg" | [number, number]`, default: `md`
- `align` (optional): `"top" | "middle" | "bottom" | "stretch"`
- `justify` (optional): `"start" | "center" | "end" | "between" | "around"`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Row, Col } from '@koi-ui/core';
const cell = 'rounded-md bg-muted p-3 text-center text-sm';
export default () => (
  <Row gutter="md">
    <Col span={12}><div className={cell}>span-12</div></Col>
    <Col span={12}><div className={cell}>span-12</div></Col>
  </Row>
);
```

```tsx
import { Row, Col } from '@koi-ui/core';
const cell = 'rounded-md bg-muted p-3 text-center text-sm';
export default () => (
  <div className="space-y-3">
    <Row gutter="md">
      <Col span={6}><div className={cell}>6</div></Col>
      <Col span={6}><div className={cell}>6</div></Col>
      <Col span={6}><div className={cell}>6</div></Col>
      <Col span={6}><div className={cell}>6</div></Col>
    </Row>
    <Row gutter="md">
      <Col span={8}><div className={cell}>8</div></Col>
      <Col span={8}><div className={cell}>8</div></Col>
      <Col span={8}><div className={cell}>8</div></Col>
    </Row>
    <Row gutter="md">
      <Col span={16}><div className={cell}>16</div></Col>
      <Col span={8}><div className={cell}>8</div></Col>
    </Row>
  </div>
);
```

## Layout

Chinese name: 布局

Layout component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Layout / 布局

```ts
import { Layout } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/layout | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/layout

### Props

- `hasSider` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Layout } from '@koi-ui/core';
const { Header, Content, Footer } = Layout;
export default () => (
  <Layout className="overflow-hidden rounded-md border border-border">
    <Header className="bg-muted px-4 py-2">Header</Header>
    <Content className="px-4 py-6">Content</Content>
    <Footer className="bg-muted px-4 py-2 text-center text-sm">Footer</Footer>
  </Layout>
);
```

```tsx
import { Layout } from '@koi-ui/core';
const { Header, Sider, Content, Footer } = Layout;
export default () => (
  <Layout className="overflow-hidden rounded-md border border-border">
    <Header className="!py-2">Header</Header>
    <Layout hasSider>
      <Sider className="p-3 text-sm">Sider</Sider>
      <Content className="!p-4">Content</Content>
    </Layout>
    <Footer className="!py-2 text-center">Footer</Footer>
  </Layout>
);
```

## Space

Chinese name: 间距

Space component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Layout / 布局

```ts
import { Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/space | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/space

### Props

- `split` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `direction` (optional): `"horizontal" | "vertical"`
- `size` (optional): `"small" | "middle" | "large"`
- `align` (optional): `"center" | "start" | "end" | "baseline"`
- `wrap` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Space, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space>
    <Button>Button 1</Button>
    <Button>Button 2</Button>
    <Button>Button 3</Button>
  </Space>
);
```

```tsx
import { Space, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <div className="space-y-4">
    <Space size="small">
      <Button size="sm">small</Button>
      <Button size="sm">small</Button>
      <Button size="sm">small</Button>
    </Space>
    <Space size="middle">
      <Button size="sm">middle</Button>
      <Button size="sm">middle</Button>
      <Button size="sm">middle</Button>
    </Space>
    <Space size="large">
      <Button size="sm">large</Button>
      <Button size="sm">large</Button>
      <Button size="sm">large</Button>
    </Space>
  </div>
);
```

## Flex

Chinese name: 弹性布局

Flex component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Layout / 布局

```ts
import { Flex } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/flex | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/flex

### Props

- `gap` (optional): `string | number` — Gap between items. Numbers use the Tailwind spacing scale
(`3` → `gap-3` equivalent). Strings are raw CSS lengths.
- `direction` (optional): `"row" | "column" | "rowReverse" | "columnReverse"`
- `align` (optional): `"stretch" | "start" | "center" | "end" | "baseline"`
- `justify` (optional): `"start" | "center" | "end" | "between" | "around" | "evenly"`
- `wrap` (optional): `"wrap" | "nowrap" | "wrapReverse"`
- `vertical` (optional): `boolean`
- `inline` (optional): `boolean`
- `responsive` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Flex, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Flex justify="between" align="center" className="rounded-md border border-border p-4">
    <span>Left</span>
    <Button size="sm">Action</Button>
  </Flex>
);
```

```tsx
import { Flex, Tag } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <div className="space-y-4">
    <Flex gap={2}>
      <Tag>row</Tag>
      <Tag color="secondary">default</Tag>
    </Flex>
    <Flex direction="column" gap={2}>
      <Tag>column</Tag>
      <Tag color="secondary">vertical</Tag>
    </Flex>
    <Flex vertical gap={2}>
      <Tag>vertical</Tag>
      <Tag color="secondary">shorthand</Tag>
    </Flex>
  </div>
);
```

## Stack

Chinese name: 堆叠

Stack component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Layout / 布局

```ts
import { Stack } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/stack | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/stack

### Props

- `gap` (optional): `string | number`, default: `4` — Gap between items. Numbers use the Tailwind spacing scale
(`3` → `gap-3` equivalent). Strings are raw CSS lengths.
- `direction` (optional): `"col" | "row"`
- `align` (optional): `"stretch" | "start" | "center" | "end"`
- `justify` (optional): `"start" | "center" | "end" | "between"`
- `responsive` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Stack, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Stack gap={2}>
    <Text weight="bold">Title</Text>
    <Text muted>Description</Text>
  </Stack>
);
```

```tsx
import { Stack, Tag } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <div className="space-y-4">
    <Stack direction="col" gap={2}>
      <Tag>col gap 2</Tag>
      <Tag color="secondary">column</Tag>
    </Stack>
    <Stack direction="row" gap={4}>
      <Tag>row gap 4</Tag>
      <Tag color="secondary">row</Tag>
      <Tag variant="outline">row</Tag>
    </Stack>
    <Stack direction="row" gap={10}>
      <Tag>row gap 10</Tag>
      <Tag color="secondary">any number</Tag>
    </Stack>
  </div>
);
```

## Box

Chinese name: 容器

Box component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Layout / 布局

```ts
import { Box } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/box | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/box

### Props

- `p` (optional): `string | number`, default: `4` — Padding. Numbers use the Tailwind spacing scale
(`3` → `p-3` equivalent). Strings are raw CSS lengths.
- `rounded` (optional): `"md" | "none" | "sm" | "lg"`
- `bg` (optional): `"surface" | "muted" | "primary"`
- `border` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Box, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Box p={6} border rounded="md">
    <Text>Container</Text>
  </Box>
);
```

```tsx
import { Box, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <div className="space-y-3">
    <Box p={2} border><Text size="sm">p=2</Text></Box>
    <Box p={3} border><Text size="sm">p=3</Text></Box>
    <Box p={4} border><Text size="sm">p=4</Text></Box>
    <Box p={10} border><Text size="sm">p=10</Text></Box>
  </div>
);
```

## SafeArea

Chinese name: 安全区

SafeArea component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Layout / 布局

```ts
import { SafeArea } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/safearea | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/safearea

### Props

- `position` (optional): `"top" | "bottom" | "both"`, default: `both`

### Examples

```tsx
import { SafeArea, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <div
    className="koi-safe-area-demo flex h-full min-h-[28rem] flex-col overflow-hidden bg-primary/25"
    style={{ ['--koi-safe-area-top']: '48px', ['--koi-safe-area-bottom']: '34px' }}
  >
    <SafeArea className="flex h-full min-h-0 flex-col bg-muted">
      <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 text-center">
        <Text className="font-medium">Safe area content</Text>
        <Text muted size="sm">Colored bands mark the safe area (default both)</Text>
      </div>
    </SafeArea>
  </div>
);
```

```tsx
import { SafeArea, Space, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space direction="vertical" size="middle" className="w-full">
    {(['top', 'bottom', 'both'] as const).map((position) => (
      <div
        key={position}
        className="overflow-hidden rounded-md bg-primary/25"
        style={{ ['--koi-safe-area-top']: '24px', ['--koi-safe-area-bottom']: '24px' }}
      >
        <SafeArea position={position} className="bg-muted px-3 py-2">
          <Text size="sm">position=&quot;{position}&quot;</Text>
        </SafeArea>
      </div>
    ))}
  </Space>
);
```

## Affix

Chinese name: 固钉

Affix component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Navigation / 导航

```ts
import { Affix } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/affix | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/affix

### Props

- `offsetTop` (optional): `number`
- `offsetBottom` (optional): `number`
- `target` (optional): `(() => HTMLElement | Window | null)`
- `onChange` (optional): `((affixed: boolean) => void)`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Affix, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <div className="space-y-3 pb-8 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
    <p className="font-medium text-surface-foreground">Scroll down to see Affix</p>
    <Affix offsetTop={0}>
      <Button>Pin to top</Button>
    </Affix>
    {Array.from({ length: 40 }, (_, i) => (
      <p key={i}>Row {i + 1}</p>
    ))}
  </div>
);
```

```tsx
import { Affix, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <div className="space-y-3 pb-8 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
    <p className="font-medium text-surface-foreground">Scroll down — the button sticks to the bottom</p>
    {Array.from({ length: 40 }, (_, i) => (
      <p key={i}>Row {i + 1}</p>
    ))}
    <Affix offsetBottom={0}>
      <Button>Pin to bottom</Button>
    </Affix>
  </div>
);
```

## Breadcrumb

Chinese name: 面包屑

Breadcrumb component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Navigation / 导航

```ts
import { Breadcrumb } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/breadcrumb | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/breadcrumb

### Props

- `items` (required): `BreadcrumbItem[]`
- `separator` (optional): `ReactNode`, default: `/`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Breadcrumb } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Breadcrumb
    items={[
      { title: 'Home' },
      { title: 'List' },
      { title: 'Details' },
    ]}
  />
);
```

```tsx
import { Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbSeparator, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space direction="vertical" size="middle" className="w-full">
    <Breadcrumb
      separator=">"
      items={[
        { title: 'Home' },
        { title: 'Components' },
        { title: 'Breadcrumb' },
      ]}
    />
    <Breadcrumb
      separator={<BreadcrumbSeparator />}
      items={[
        { title: 'Home' },
        { title: 'Components' },
        { title: 'Breadcrumb' },
      ]}
    />
  </Space>
);
```

## Dropdown

Chinese name: 下拉菜单

Dropdown component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Navigation / 导航

```ts
import { Dropdown } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/dropdown | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/dropdown

### Props

- `trigger` (required): `ReactNode`
- `items` (required): `DropdownItem[]`
- `title` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `placement` (optional): `"bottom-start" | "bottom-end" | "top-start" | "top-end"`
- `disabled` (optional): `boolean`
- `responsive` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `onSelect` (optional): `((key: string) => void)`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Dropdown, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Dropdown
    trigger={<Button>Dropdown</Button>}
    items={[
      { key: '1', label: 'Option 1' },
      { key: '2', label: 'Option 2' },
    ]}
  />
);
```

```tsx
import { Dropdown, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Dropdown
    trigger={<Button>Actions</Button>}
    items={[
      { key: 'edit', label: 'Edit' },
      { key: 'copy', label: 'Copy' },
      { key: 'delete', label: 'Delete', color: 'error' },
      { key: 'archive', label: 'Archive', disabled: true },
    ]}
  />
);
```

## Menu

Chinese name: 菜单

Menu component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Navigation / 导航

```ts
import { Menu } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/menu | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/menu

### Props

- `items` (required): `MenuItemType[]`
- `selectedKey` (optional): `string`
- `defaultSelectedKey` (optional): `string`
- `openKeys` (optional): `string[]`
- `defaultOpenKeys` (optional): `string[]`, default: `[]`
- `onSelect` (optional): `((key: string) => void)`
- `onOpenChange` (optional): `((openKeys: string[]) => void)`
- `mode` (optional): `"vertical" | "horizontal" | "inline"`, default: `vertical`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Menu } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Menu
    defaultSelectedKey="1"
    items={[
      { key: '1', label: 'Nav 1' },
      { key: '2', label: 'Nav 2' },
      { key: '3', label: 'Nav 3' },
    ]}
  />
);
```

```tsx
import { Menu, Space, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';

const items = [
  { key: '1', label: 'Home' },
  { key: '2', label: 'Explore' },
  { key: '3', label: 'Profile' },
];

export default () => (
  <Space direction="vertical" size="middle" className="w-full">
    <div>
      <Text size="sm" className="mb-2 block text-muted-foreground">vertical</Text>
      <Menu mode="vertical" defaultSelectedKey="1" items={items} />
    </div>
    <div>
      <Text size="sm" className="mb-2 block text-muted-foreground">horizontal</Text>
      <Menu mode="horizontal" defaultSelectedKey="2" items={items} />
    </div>
    <div>
      <Text size="sm" className="mb-2 block text-muted-foreground">inline</Text>
      <Menu mode="inline" defaultSelectedKey="3" items={items} />
    </div>
  </Space>
);
```

## Pagination

Chinese name: 分页

Pagination component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Navigation / 导航

```ts
import { Pagination } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/pagination | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/pagination

### Props

- `current` (required): `number`
- `total` (required): `number`
- `pageSize` (optional): `number`, default: `10`
- `onChange` (optional): `((page: number) => void)`
- `className` (optional): `string`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Pagination } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  return <Pagination current={page} total={50} onChange={setPage} />;
};
```

```tsx
import { Pagination, Space, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  return (
    <Space direction="vertical" size="middle" className="w-full">
      <div>
        <Text muted size="sm" className="mb-2 block">pageSize=10 · total=100</Text>
        <Pagination current={page} total={100} pageSize={10} onChange={setPage} />
      </div>
      <div>
        <Text muted size="sm" className="mb-2 block">pageSize=20 · total=100</Text>
        <Pagination current={1} total={100} pageSize={20} />
      </div>
    </Space>
  );
};
```

## Steps

Chinese name: 步骤条

Steps component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Navigation / 导航

```ts
import { Steps } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/steps | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/steps

### Props

- `items` (required): `StepItem[]`
- `current` (optional): `number`
- `onChange` (optional): `((current: number) => void)`
- `direction` (optional): `"horizontal" | "vertical"`, default: `horizontal`
- `size` (optional): `"md" | "sm" | "lg"`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Steps } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Steps
    current={1}
    items={[
      { title: 'Done' },
      { title: 'In progress' },
      { title: 'Waiting' },
    ]}
  />
);
```

```tsx
import { Steps } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Steps
    current={3}
    items={[
      { title: 'Details', description: 'Done' },
      { title: 'Confirm', description: 'Done' },
      { title: 'Pay', description: 'Done' },
      { title: 'Complete' },
    ]}
  />
);
```

## Tabs

Chinese name: 标签页

Tabs component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Navigation / 导航

```ts
import { Tabs } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/tabs | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/tabs

### Props

- `items` (required): `TabItem[]`
- `defaultActiveKey` (optional): `string`
- `activeKey` (optional): `string`
- `onChange` (optional): `((key: string) => void)`
- `className` (optional): `string`
- `variant` (optional): `"line" | "boxed" | "bordered" | "lifted"`, default: `line`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Tabs, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Tabs
    items={[
      { key: '1', label: 'Tab1', children: <Text>Content 1</Text> },
      { key: '2', label: 'Tab2', children: <Text>Content 2</Text> },
    ]}
  />
);
```

```tsx
import { Tabs, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [key, setKey] = useState('profile');
  return (
    <Tabs
      activeKey={key}
      onChange={setKey}
      items={[
        { key: 'profile', label: 'Profile', children: <Text>Profile panel</Text> },
        { key: 'settings', label: 'Settings', children: <Text>Settings panel</Text> },
      ]}
    />
  );
};
```

## NavBar

Chinese name: 导航栏

NavBar component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Navigation / 导航

```ts
import { NavBar } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/navbar | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/navbar

### Props

- `title` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `left` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `right` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `onBack` (optional): `(() => void)`
- `backIcon` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `fixed` (optional): `boolean` — 是否固定在视口顶部。
文档预览（KoiProvider.previewDevice）下默认 false，避免脱出演示容器。
- `safeArea` (optional): `boolean`
- `bordered` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { NavBar } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <NavBar title="Page title" onBack={() => {}} />;
```

```tsx
import { NavBar, Button, Icon, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space direction="vertical" size="middle" className="w-full">
    <NavBar
      title="Custom back icon"
      onBack={() => {}}
      backIcon={<Icon name="close" size="md" />}
    />
    <NavBar
      title="Custom left"
      left={<Button size="sm" variant="ghost">Close</Button>}
      right={<Button size="sm" variant="ghost">Share</Button>}
    />
  </Space>
);
```

## TabBar

Chinese name: 标签栏

TabBar component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Navigation / 导航

```ts
import { TabBar } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/tabbar | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/tabbar

### Props

- `items` (required): `TabBarItem[]`
- `activeKey` (optional): `string`
- `defaultActiveKey` (optional): `string`
- `onChange` (optional): `((key: string) => void)`
- `safeArea` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { TabBar } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <div className="relative h-16 overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-border">
    <TabBar
      className="relative"
      defaultActiveKey="home"
      items={[
        { key: 'home', label: 'Home' },
        { key: 'discover', label: 'Discover' },
        { key: 'mine', label: 'Me' },
      ]}
    />
  </div>
);
```

```tsx
import { TabBar, Icon } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <div className="relative h-16 overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-border">
    <TabBar
      className="relative"
      defaultActiveKey="home"
      items={[
        { key: 'home', label: 'Home', icon: <Icon name="check" size="sm" /> },
        { key: 'search', label: 'Search', icon: <Icon name="search" size="sm" />, badge: 3 },
        { key: 'mine', label: 'Me', icon: <Icon name="plus" size="sm" />, badge: 'New' },
      ]}
    />
  </div>
);
```

## IndexBar

Chinese name: 索引栏

IndexBar component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Navigation / 导航

```ts
import { IndexBar } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/indexbar | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/indexbar

### Props

- `groups` (required): `IndexBarGroup<T>[]`
- `renderItem` (required): `(item: T, index: number) => ReactNode`
- `stickyOffset` (optional): `number`
- `onIndexChange` (optional): `((index: string) => void)`

### Examples

```tsx
import { IndexBar } from '@koi-ui/core';
const groups = [
  { index: 'A', items: ['Apple', 'Ant', 'Avocado'] },
  { index: 'B', items: ['Banana', 'Blueberry'] },
  { index: 'C', items: ['Cherry', 'Coconut'] },
  { index: 'D', items: ['Date', 'Dragonfruit'] },
];
export default () => (
  <div className="koi-indexbar-demo flex h-[20rem] min-h-0 overflow-hidden rounded-md border border-border">
    <IndexBar className="min-h-0 min-w-0 flex-1" groups={groups} renderItem={(item) => <span>{item}</span>} />
  </div>
);
```

```tsx
import { IndexBar, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
const groups = [
  { index: 'A', title: 'Group A', items: ['Apple', 'Ant', 'Avocado', 'Apricot'] },
  { index: 'B', title: 'Group B', items: ['Banana', 'Blueberry', 'Blackberry'] },
  { index: 'C', title: 'Group C', items: ['Cherry', 'Coconut', 'Cranberry'] },
  { index: 'D', title: 'Group D', items: ['Date', 'Dragonfruit', 'Durian'] },
];
export default () => {
  const [active, setActive] = useState('A');
  return (
    <div className="space-y-2">
      <Text muted size="sm">Active index: {active}</Text>
      <div className="koi-indexbar-demo flex h-[20rem] min-h-0 overflow-hidden rounded-md border border-border">
        <IndexBar
          className="min-h-0 min-w-0 flex-1"
          groups={groups}
          stickyOffset={8}
          onIndexChange={setActive}
          renderItem={(item) => <span>{item}</span>}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};
```

## AutoComplete

Chinese name: 自动完成

AutoComplete component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { AutoComplete } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/autocomplete | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/autocomplete

### Props

- `options` (required): `AutoCompleteOption[]`
- `value` (optional): `string`
- `defaultValue` (optional): `string`
- `onChange` (optional): `((value: string) => void)`
- `onSelect` (optional): `((option: AutoCompleteOption) => void)`
- `placeholder` (optional): `string`, default: `请输入`
- `disabled` (optional): `boolean`
- `size` (optional): `"sm" | "md" | "lg"`, default: `md`
- `error` (optional): `string | boolean` — String shows message; boolean only styles the border (Form.Item owns copy).
- `className` (optional): `string`
- `filterOption` (optional): `((input: string, option: AutoCompleteOption) => boolean)`
- `clearable` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { AutoComplete } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <AutoComplete
    options={[
      { value: 'apple', label: 'Apple' },
      { value: 'banana', label: 'Banana' },
    ]}
    placeholder="Search"
  />
);
```

```tsx
import { AutoComplete } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [value, setValue] = useState('apple');
  return (
    <AutoComplete
      value={value}
      onChange={setValue}
      clearable
      options={[
        { value: 'apple', label: 'Apple' },
        { value: 'banana', label: 'Banana' },
      ]}
      placeholder="Search"
    />
  );
};
```

## Checkbox

Chinese name: 多选框

Checkbox component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { Checkbox } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/checkbox | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/checkbox

### Props

- `label` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `onChange` (optional): `((checked: boolean) => void)`
- `checkboxValue` (optional): `string`
- `size` (optional): `"md" | "sm" | "lg"`, default: `md`
- `color` (optional): `ControlColor`, default: `primary`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Checkbox, CheckboxGroup } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <CheckboxGroup defaultValue={['a']}>
    <Checkbox checkboxValue="a" label="Option A" />
    <Checkbox checkboxValue="b" label="Option B" />
  </CheckboxGroup>
);
```

```tsx
import { Checkbox, CheckboxGroup, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [values, setValues] = useState(['read']);
  return (
    <div>
      <CheckboxGroup value={values} onChange={setValues}>
        <Checkbox checkboxValue="read" label="Read" />
        <Checkbox checkboxValue="write" label="Write" />
        <Checkbox checkboxValue="code" label="Code" />
      </CheckboxGroup>
      <Text muted className="mt-2 block text-sm">Selected: {values.join(', ') || 'None'}</Text>
    </div>
  );
};
```

## DatePicker

Chinese name: 日期选择

DatePicker component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { DatePicker } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/datepicker | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/datepicker

### Props

- `value` (optional): `string`
- `onChange` (optional): `((value: string) => void)`
- `placeholder` (optional): `string`
- `disabled` (optional): `boolean`
- `min` (optional): `string`
- `max` (optional): `string`
- `clearable` (optional): `boolean`
- `responsive` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `size` (optional): `FieldSize`

### Examples

```tsx
import { DatePicker } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [v, setV] = useState('');
  return <DatePicker value={v} onChange={setV} placeholder="Select date" />;
};
```

```tsx
import { DatePicker, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [date, setDate] = useState('2026-07-12');
  return (
    <div>
      <DatePicker value={date} onChange={setDate} placeholder="Select date" />
      <Text muted className="mt-2 block text-sm">Selected: {date || 'None'}</Text>
    </div>
  );
};
```

## Form

Chinese name: 表单

Form component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { Form } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/form | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/form

### Props

- `form` (optional): `FormInstance<Values>`
- `initialValues` (optional): `Partial<Values>`
- `layout` (optional): `FormLayout`
- `responsive` (optional): `boolean`
- `onValuesChange` (optional): `((changed: Partial<Values>, allValues: Values) => void)`
- `onFinish` (optional): `((values: Values) => void)`
- `onFinishFailed` (optional): `((errorInfo: ValidateErrorEntity<Values>) => void)`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Form, Input, Button, toast } from '@koi-ui/core';

export default () => (
  <Form
    layout="vertical"
    onFinish={(values) => toast.success(`Hello ${values.username}`)}
  >
    <Form.Item
      name="username"
      label="Username"
      rules={[{ required: true, message: 'Enter textUsername' }]}
    >
      <Input placeholder="Enter text" clearable />
    </Form.Item>
    <Button color="primary" type="submit">Submit</Button>
  </Form>
);
```

```tsx
import { Form, Input, InputNumber, Switch, Button, Space, toast } from '@koi-ui/core';

export default () => {
  const [form] = Form.useForm();
  return (
    <Form
      form={form}
      layout="vertical"
      initialValues={{ age: 18, notify: true }}
      onFinish={(values) => toast.success(JSON.stringify(values))}
      onFinishFailed={() => toast.error('请检查表单')}
    >
      <Form.Item
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        rules={[
          { required: true, message: '必填' },
          { type: 'email', message: 'Email格式不正确' },
        ]}
      >
        <Input placeholder="name@example.com" clearable />
      </Form.Item>
      <Form.Item name="age" label="Age" rules={[{ type: 'number', min: 1, max: 120, message: '1-120' }]}>
        <InputNumber />
      </Form.Item>
      <Form.Item name="notify" label="Notice" valuePropName="checked">
        <Switch />
      </Form.Item>
      <Space>
        <Button color="primary" type="submit">Submit</Button>
        <Button type="button" variant="outline" onClick={() => form.resetFields()}>重置</Button>
      </Space>
    </Form>
  );
};
```

## Input

Chinese name: 输入框

Input component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { Input } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/input | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/input

### Props

- `onChange` (optional): `((value: string) => void)`
- `error` (optional): `string | boolean` — String shows message; boolean only styles the border (Form.Item owns copy).
- `size` (optional): `"sm" | "md" | "lg"`
- `clearable` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Input } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <Input placeholder="Enter text" />;
```

```tsx
import { Input, Stack } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Stack gap={3}>
    <Input placeholder="Normal" />
    <Input placeholder="Invalid" error="Enter valid content" />
    <Input placeholder="Disabled" disabled />
  </Stack>
);
```

## InputNumber

Chinese name: 数字输入

InputNumber component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { InputNumber } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/inputnumber | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/inputnumber

### Props

- `value` (optional): `number`
- `defaultValue` (optional): `number`
- `onChange` (optional): `((value: number) => void)`
- `min` (optional): `number`
- `max` (optional): `number`
- `step` (optional): `number`, default: `1`
- `disabled` (optional): `boolean`
- `size` (optional): `"sm" | "md" | "lg"`, default: `md`
- `error` (optional): `string | boolean` — String shows message; boolean only styles the border (Form.Item owns copy).
- `className` (optional): `string`
- `placeholder` (optional): `string`
- `clearable` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { InputNumber } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [v, setV] = useState(1);
  return <InputNumber value={v} onChange={setV} />;
};
```

```tsx
import { InputNumber } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [v, setV] = useState(12);
  return <InputNumber value={v} onChange={setV} clearable />;
};
```

## Radio

Chinese name: 单选框

Radio component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { Radio } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/radio | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/radio

### Props

- `label` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `radioValue` (required): `string`
- `onChange` (optional): `((value: string) => void)`
- `size` (optional): `"md" | "sm" | "lg"`, default: `md`
- `color` (optional): `ControlColor`, default: `primary`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Radio, RadioGroup } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <RadioGroup defaultValue="a">
    <Radio radioValue="a" label="Option A" />
    <Radio radioValue="b" label="Option B" />
  </RadioGroup>
);
```

```tsx
import { Radio, RadioGroup, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [value, setValue] = useState('a');
  return (
    <div>
      <RadioGroup value={value} onChange={setValue}>
        <Radio radioValue="a" label="Plan A" />
        <Radio radioValue="b" label="Plan B" />
      </RadioGroup>
      <Text muted className="mt-2 block text-sm">Current: {value}</Text>
    </div>
  );
};
```

## Rate

Chinese name: 评分

Rate component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { Rate } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/rate | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/rate

### Props

- `value` (optional): `number`
- `defaultValue` (optional): `number`
- `onChange` (optional): `((value: number) => void)`
- `count` (optional): `number`, default: `5`
- `allowHalf` (optional): `boolean`
- `disabled` (optional): `boolean`
- `color` (optional): `ControlColor`, default: `warning`
- `className` (optional): `string`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Rate } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <Rate defaultValue={3} />;
```

```tsx
import { Rate } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <Rate allowHalf defaultValue={2.5} />;
```

## Select

Chinese name: 选择器

Select component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { Select } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/select | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/select

### Props

- `options` (required): `SelectOption[]`
- `value` (optional): `string`
- `onChange` (optional): `((value: string) => void)`
- `placeholder` (optional): `string`
- `disabled` (optional): `boolean`
- `clearable` (optional): `boolean`
- `responsive` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `size` (optional): `FieldSize`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Select } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [v, setV] = useState('');
  return (
    <Select
      options={[
        { label: 'Beijing', value: 'bj' },
        { label: 'Shanghai', value: 'sh' },
      ]}
      value={v}
      onChange={setV}
      placeholder="Select city"
    />
  );
};
```

```tsx
import { Select, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [city, setCity] = useState('sh');
  return (
    <div>
      <Select
        value={city}
        onChange={setCity}
        placeholder="Select city"
        options={[
          { label: 'Beijing', value: 'bj' },
          { label: 'Shanghai', value: 'sh' },
          { label: 'Guangzhou', value: 'gz' },
        ]}
      />
      <Text muted className="mt-2 block text-sm">Current: {city}</Text>
    </div>
  );
};
```

## Slider

Chinese name: 滑动输入

Slider component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { Slider } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/slider | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/slider

### Props

- `value` (optional): `number`
- `defaultValue` (optional): `number`
- `onChange` (optional): `((value: number) => void)`
- `min` (optional): `number`
- `max` (optional): `number`, default: `100`
- `step` (optional): `number`, default: `1`
- `size` (optional): `"md" | "sm" | "lg"`
- `color` (optional): `ControlColor`, default: `primary`
- `showValue` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Slider } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <Slider defaultValue={40} />;
```

```tsx
import { Slider, Stack } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Stack gap={4}>
    <Slider size="sm" defaultValue={30} />
    <Slider size="md" defaultValue={50} />
    <Slider size="lg" defaultValue={70} />
  </Stack>
);
```

## Switch

Chinese name: 开关

Switch component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { Switch } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/switch | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/switch

### Props

- `checked` (optional): `boolean`
- `defaultChecked` (optional): `boolean`
- `onChange` (optional): `((checked: boolean) => void)`
- `size` (optional): `"sm" | "md" | "lg"`, default: `md`
- `color` (optional): `ControlColor`, default: `primary`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Switch } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <Switch defaultChecked />;
```

```tsx
import { Switch, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space align="center">
    <Switch size="sm" defaultChecked />
    <Switch size="md" defaultChecked />
    <Switch size="lg" defaultChecked />
  </Space>
);
```

## TextArea

Chinese name: 文本域

TextArea component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { TextArea } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/textarea | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/textarea

### Props

- `onChange` (optional): `((value: string) => void)`
- `error` (optional): `string | boolean` — String shows message; boolean only styles the border (Form.Item owns copy).
- `size` (optional): `"md" | "sm" | "lg"`
- `showCount` (optional): `boolean`
- `maxLength` (optional): `number`
- `clearable` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { TextArea } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <TextArea placeholder="Enter multiple lines" rows={3} />;
```

```tsx
import { TextArea, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space direction="vertical" size="middle" className="w-full">
    <TextArea size="sm" placeholder="sm" rows={2} />
    <TextArea size="md" placeholder="md" rows={3} />
    <TextArea size="lg" placeholder="lg" rows={4} />
  </Space>
);
```

## TimePicker

Chinese name: 时间选择

TimePicker component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { TimePicker } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/timepicker | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/timepicker

### Props

- `value` (optional): `string`
- `onChange` (optional): `((value: string) => void)`
- `placeholder` (optional): `string`
- `disabled` (optional): `boolean`
- `format` (optional): `"HH:mm" | "HH:mm:ss"`
- `clearable` (optional): `boolean`
- `responsive` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `size` (optional): `FieldSize`

### Examples

```tsx
import { TimePicker } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [v, setV] = useState('');
  return <TimePicker value={v} onChange={setV} placeholder="Select time" />;
};
```

```tsx
import { TimePicker } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [v, setV] = useState('09:30');
  return <TimePicker value={v} onChange={setV} clearable placeholder="Select time" />;
};
```

## Upload

Chinese name: 上传

Upload component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { Upload } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/upload | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/upload

### Props

- `value` (optional): `UploadFileItem[]`
- `defaultValue` (optional): `UploadFileItem[]`, default: `[]`
- `onChange` (optional): `((files: UploadFileItem[]) => void)`
- `accept` (optional): `string`
- `multiple` (optional): `boolean`
- `disabled` (optional): `boolean`
- `maxCount` (optional): `number`
- `className` (optional): `string`
- `hint` (optional): `string`, default: `点击或拖拽文件到此处上传`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Upload } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <Upload accept="image/*" />;
```

```tsx
import { Upload } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Upload accept="image/*" hint="JPG/PNG only, max 5MB per file" />
);
```

## Cascader

Chinese name: 级联选择

Cascader component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { Cascader } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/cascader | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/cascader

### Props

- `options` (required): `CascaderOption[]`
- `value` (optional): `string[]`
- `onChange` (optional): `((value: string[], labels: string[]) => void)`
- `placeholder` (optional): `string`
- `disabled` (optional): `boolean`
- `clearable` (optional): `boolean`
- `responsive` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `size` (optional): `FieldSize`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Cascader } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
const options = [
  {
    label: 'Zhejiang',
    value: 'zj',
    children: [
      {
        label: 'Hangzhou',
        value: 'hz',
        children: [
          { label: 'Xihu', value: 'xh' },
          { label: 'Yuhang', value: 'yh' },
          { label: 'Binjiang', value: 'bj' },
        ],
      },
      {
        label: 'Ningbo',
        value: 'nb',
        children: [
          { label: 'Haishu', value: 'hs' },
          { label: 'Yinzhou', value: 'yz' },
          { label: 'Beilun', value: 'bl' },
        ],
      },
      {
        label: 'Wenzhou',
        value: 'wz',
        children: [
          { label: 'Lucheng', value: 'lc' },
          { label: 'Ouhai', value: 'oh' },
        ],
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    label: 'Jiangsu',
    value: 'js',
    children: [
      {
        label: 'Nanjing',
        value: 'nj',
        children: [
          { label: 'Xuanwu', value: 'xw' },
          { label: 'Qinhuai', value: 'qh' },
          { label: 'Jianye', value: 'jy' },
        ],
      },
      {
        label: 'Suzhou',
        value: 'sz',
        children: [
          { label: 'Gusu', value: 'gs' },
          { label: 'SIP', value: 'gyyq' },
          { label: 'Wuzhong', value: 'wz2' },
        ],
      },
      {
        label: 'Wuxi',
        value: 'wx',
        children: [
          { label: 'Liangxi', value: 'lx' },
          { label: 'Binhu', value: 'bh' },
        ],
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    label: 'Guangdong',
    value: 'gd',
    children: [
      {
        label: 'Guangzhou',
        value: 'gz',
        children: [
          { label: 'Tianhe', value: 'th' },
          { label: 'Yuexiu', value: 'yx' },
          { label: 'Haizhu', value: 'hz2' },
        ],
      },
      {
        label: 'Shenzhen',
        value: 'sz2',
        children: [
          { label: 'Nanshan', value: 'ns' },
          { label: 'Futian', value: 'ft' },
          { label: 'Baoan', value: 'ba' },
        ],
      },
      {
        label: 'Zhuhai',
        value: 'zh',
        children: [
          { label: 'Xiangzhou', value: 'xz' },
          { label: 'Jinwan', value: 'jw' },
        ],
      },
    ],
  },
];
export default () => {
  const [value, setValue] = useState<string[]>([]);
  return <Cascader value={value} onChange={setValue} options={options} placeholder="Select region" />;
};
```

```tsx
import { Cascader } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
const options = [
  {
    label: 'Zhejiang',
    value: 'zj',
    children: [
      {
        label: 'Hangzhou',
        value: 'hz',
        children: [
          { label: 'Xihu', value: 'xh' },
          { label: 'Yuhang', value: 'yh' },
          { label: 'Binjiang', value: 'bj' },
        ],
      },
      {
        label: 'Ningbo',
        value: 'nb',
        children: [
          { label: 'Haishu', value: 'hs' },
          { label: 'Yinzhou', value: 'yz' },
        ],
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    label: 'Jiangsu',
    value: 'js',
    children: [
      {
        label: 'Nanjing',
        value: 'nj',
        children: [
          { label: 'Xuanwu', value: 'xw' },
          { label: 'Qinhuai', value: 'qh' },
        ],
      },
      {
        label: 'Suzhou',
        value: 'sz',
        children: [
          { label: 'Gusu', value: 'gs' },
          { label: 'SIP', value: 'gyyq' },
        ],
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    label: 'Guangdong',
    value: 'gd',
    children: [
      {
        label: 'Guangzhou',
        value: 'gz',
        children: [
          { label: 'Tianhe', value: 'th' },
          { label: 'Yuexiu', value: 'yx' },
        ],
      },
      {
        label: 'Shenzhen',
        value: 'sz2',
        children: [
          { label: 'Nanshan', value: 'ns' },
          { label: 'Futian', value: 'ft' },
        ],
      },
    ],
  },
];
export default () => {
  const [value, setValue] = useState(['zj', 'hz', 'xh']);
  return <Cascader value={value} onChange={setValue} options={options} clearable placeholder="Select region" />;
};
```

## Picker

Chinese name: 选择器(移动)

Picker component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { Picker } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/picker | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/picker

### Props

- `columns` (required): `PickerColumn[]`
- `value` (optional): `string[]`
- `onChange` (optional): `((value: string[]) => void)`
- `placeholder` (optional): `string`
- `disabled` (optional): `boolean`
- `clearable` (optional): `boolean`
- `responsive` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `size` (optional): `FieldSize`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Picker } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Picker
    placeholder="Select"
    columns={[
      { options: [{ label: 'Mon', value: '1' }, { label: 'Tue', value: '2' }, { label: 'Wed', value: '3' }] },
      { options: [{ label: 'AM', value: 'am' }, { label: 'PM', value: 'pm' }] },
    ]}
  />
);
```

```tsx
import { Picker } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
const columns = [
  { options: [{ label: 'Mon', value: '1' }, { label: 'Tue', value: '2' }, { label: 'Wed', value: '3' }] },
  { options: [{ label: 'AM', value: 'am' }, { label: 'PM', value: 'pm' }] },
];
export default () => {
  const [value, setValue] = useState(['2', 'pm']);
  return <Picker value={value} onChange={setValue} columns={columns} clearable placeholder="Select slot" />;
};
```

## SearchBar

Chinese name: 搜索栏

SearchBar component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { SearchBar } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/searchbar | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/searchbar

### Props

- `value` (optional): `string`
- `defaultValue` (optional): `string`
- `onChange` (optional): `((value: string) => void)`
- `onSearch` (optional): `((value: string) => void)`
- `placeholder` (optional): `string`
- `disabled` (optional): `boolean`
- `className` (optional): `string`
- `showCancel` (optional): `boolean`
- `clearable` (optional): `boolean`
- `responsive` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `size` (optional): `FieldSize`

### Examples

```tsx
import { SearchBar } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <SearchBar placeholder="Search" />;
```

```tsx
import { SearchBar, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [keyword, setKeyword] = useState('');
  return (
    <div>
      <SearchBar value={keyword} onChange={setKeyword} placeholder="Search products" />
      <Text muted className="mt-2 block text-sm">Keyword: {keyword || 'None'}</Text>
    </div>
  );
};
```

## Stepper

Chinese name: 步进器

Stepper component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data entry / 数据录入

```ts
import { Stepper } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/stepper | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/stepper

### Props

- `value` (optional): `number`
- `defaultValue` (optional): `number`
- `onChange` (optional): `((value: number) => void)`
- `min` (optional): `number`
- `max` (optional): `number`
- `step` (optional): `number`, default: `1`
- `disabled` (optional): `boolean`
- `size` (optional): `"sm" | "md" | "lg"`, default: `md`
- `color` (optional): `ControlColor`, default: `primary` — Accent color.
- `label` (optional): `string`
- `className` (optional): `string`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Stepper } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <Stepper defaultValue={1} />;
```

```tsx
import { Stepper, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space align="center" size="middle">
    <Stepper size="sm" defaultValue={1} />
    <Stepper size="md" defaultValue={2} />
    <Stepper size="lg" defaultValue={3} />
  </Space>
);
```

## Avatar

Chinese name: 头像

Avatar component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Avatar } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/avatar | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/avatar

### Props

- `src` (optional): `string`
- `alt` (optional): `string`
- `fallback` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `preview` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true` — Click image to preview. Only works when `src` is set.
- `status` (optional): `"online" | "offline" | "busy" | "away"` — Presence indicator.
- `size` (optional): `"md" | "sm" | "lg" | "xl"`
- `shape` (optional): `"circle" | "square"`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Avatar, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space>
    <Avatar fallback="K" />
    <Avatar src="https://api.dicebear.com/9.x/avataaars/svg?seed=koi" alt="Koi" />
  </Space>
);
```

```tsx
import { Avatar, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space align="center">
    <Avatar size="sm" fallback="S" />
    <Avatar size="md" fallback="M" />
    <Avatar size="lg" fallback="L" />
    <Avatar size="xl" fallback="XL" />
  </Space>
);
```

## Badge

Chinese name: 徽标

Badge component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Badge } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/badge | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/badge

### Props

- `count` (optional): `number`
- `max` (optional): `number`, default: `99`
- `showZero` (optional): `boolean`
- `color` (optional): `"neutral" | "primary" | "secondary" | "info" | "success" | "warning" | "error"`
- `variant` (optional): `"soft" | "outline" | "dash" | "solid" | "ghost"`
- `size` (optional): `"md" | "sm" | "lg"`
- `dot` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Badge, Button, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space>
    <Badge count={5}><Button>Messages</Button></Badge>
    <Badge count={99}><Button>Alerts</Button></Badge>
    <Badge count={100} max={99}><Button>Overflow</Button></Badge>
  </Space>
);
```

```tsx
import { Badge, Button, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space wrap>
    <Badge count={5} color="error"><Button>error</Button></Badge>
    <Badge count={3} color="primary" variant="soft"><Button variant="soft">soft</Button></Badge>
    <Badge count={9} color="secondary"><Button color="secondary">secondary</Button></Badge>
    <Badge count={4} color="info" variant="outline"><Button variant="outline">outline</Button></Badge>
    <Badge count={1} color="success" variant="ghost"><Button variant="ghost">ghost</Button></Badge>
  </Space>
);
```

## Calendar

Chinese name: 日历

Embedded month panel for dashboards, scheduling, or any inline date display. For form inputs with desktop popover and mobile wheel picker, use [DatePicker](/components/datepicker).

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Calendar } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/calendar | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/calendar

### Props

- `value` (optional): `Date`
- `defaultValue` (optional): `Date`
- `onChange` (optional): `((date: Date) => void)`
- `disabledDate` (optional): `((date: Date) => boolean)`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Calendar } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <Calendar />;
```

```tsx
import { Calendar, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [date, setDate] = useState(new Date(2026, 6, 15));
  return (
    <div>
      <Calendar value={date} onChange={setDate} />
      <Text muted className="mt-3 block text-sm">
        Selected: {date.toLocaleDateString('en-US')}
      </Text>
    </div>
  );
};
```

## Card

Chinese name: 卡片

Card component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Card } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/card | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/card

### Props

- `title` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `cover` (optional): `ReactNode` — Image / media region (daisyUI figure).
- `footer` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `actions` (optional): `ReactNode` — Action row (buttons), daisyUI card-actions.
- `padding` (optional): `"md" | "none" | "sm" | "lg"`, default: `md`
- `hoverable` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Card, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Card title="Card title">
    <Text>Card content</Text>
  </Card>
);
```

```tsx
import { Card, Text, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space direction="vertical" size="middle" className="w-full">
    <Card padding="sm" title="sm"><Text size="sm">Small padding</Text></Card>
    <Card padding="md" title="md"><Text size="sm">Default padding</Text></Card>
    <Card padding="lg" title="lg"><Text size="sm">Large padding</Text></Card>
  </Space>
);
```

## Collapse

Chinese name: 折叠面板

Collapse component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Collapse } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/collapse | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/collapse

### Props

- `items` (required): `CollapseItem[]`
- `defaultActiveKeys` (optional): `string[]`, default: `[]`
- `activeKeys` (optional): `string[]`
- `onChange` (optional): `((keys: string[]) => void)`
- `accordion` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Collapse } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Collapse
    defaultActiveKeys={['1']}
    items={[
      { key: '1', label: 'Panel one', children: 'Content of panel one.' },
      { key: '2', label: 'Panel two', children: 'Content of panel two.' },
      { key: '3', label: 'Panel three', children: 'Content of panel three.' },
    ]}
  />
);
```

```tsx
import { Collapse } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Collapse
    accordion
    defaultActiveKeys={['1']}
    items={[
      { key: '1', label: 'Only one open', children: 'With accordion, only one panel stays open.' },
      { key: '2', label: 'Another', children: 'Opening this closes the previous one.' },
      { key: '3', label: 'Disabled', children: 'Cannot expand', disabled: true },
    ]}
  />
);
```

## Descriptions

Chinese name: 描述列表

Descriptions component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Descriptions } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/descriptions | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/descriptions

### Props

- `title` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `items` (required): `DescriptionItem[]`
- `column` (optional): `number`, default: `3`
- `bordered` (optional): `boolean`
- `size` (optional): `"sm" | "md" | "lg"`, default: `md`
- `layout` (optional): `"horizontal" | "vertical"`, default: `horizontal`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Descriptions } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Descriptions
    items={[
      { key: 'name', label: 'Name', children: 'Alice' },
      { key: 'phone', label: 'Phone', children: '138****0000' },
    ]}
  />
);
```

```tsx
import { Descriptions } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Descriptions
    title="User profile"
    column={2}
    items={[
      { key: 'name', label: 'Name', children: 'Alice' },
      { key: 'phone', label: 'Phone', children: '138****0000' },
      { key: 'city', label: 'City', children: 'Shanghai' },
      { key: 'role', label: 'Role', children: 'Admin' },
      { key: 'address', label: 'Address', children: '88 Example Road', span: 2 },
    ]}
  />
);
```

## Empty

Chinese name: 空状态

Empty component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Empty } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/empty | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/empty

### Props

- `description` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `image` (optional): `ReactNode`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Empty } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <Empty description="No data" />;
```

```tsx
import { Empty, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Empty description="Nothing here yet">
    <Button size="sm">Create</Button>
  </Empty>
);
```

## Image

Chinese name: 图片

Image component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Image } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/image | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/image

### Props

- `fallback` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `preview` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Image } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Image src="https://picsum.photos/200/120" alt="demo" width={200} height={120} />
);
```

```tsx
import { Image } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Image
    src="https://picsum.photos/240/160"
    alt="preview"
    width={240}
    height={160}
    preview
  />
);
```

## List

Chinese name: 列表

List component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { List } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/list | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/list

### Props

- `items` (required): `ListItem[]`
- `header` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `footer` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `bordered` (optional): `boolean`
- `size` (optional): `"md" | "sm" | "lg"`, default: `md`

### Examples

```tsx
import { List } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <List
    items={[
      { key: '1', title: 'Item one', description: 'Description one' },
      { key: '2', title: 'Item two', description: 'Description two' },
    ]}
  />
);
```

```tsx
import { List, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space direction="vertical" size="middle" className="w-full">
    <List
      bordered
      size="sm"
      items={[
        { key: '1', title: 'Small list', description: 'size=sm' },
        { key: '2', title: 'Another item', description: 'Desc' },
      ]}
    />
    <List
      bordered
      size="lg"
      items={[
        { key: '1', title: 'Large list', description: 'size=lg' },
        { key: '2', title: 'Another item', description: 'Desc' },
      ]}
    />
  </Space>
);
```

## Popover

Chinese name: 气泡卡片

Popover component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Popover } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/popover | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/popover

### Props

- `content` (required): `ReactNode`
- `title` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `placement` (optional): `PopoverPlacement`, default: `bottom`
- `open` (optional): `boolean`
- `defaultOpen` (optional): `boolean`
- `onOpenChange` (optional): `((open: boolean) => void)`
- `trigger` (optional): `"click" | "hover"`, default: `click`
- `className` (optional): `string`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Popover, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <div className="flex justify-center py-8">
    <Popover content="Popover content">
      <Button>Click</Button>
    </Popover>
  </div>
);
```

```tsx
import { Popover, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <div className="flex justify-center py-8">
    <Popover title="Title" content="Popover body with a title.">
      <Button variant="outline">With title</Button>
    </Popover>
  </div>
);
```

## Segmented

Chinese name: 分段控制器

Segmented component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Segmented } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/segmented | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/segmented

### Props

- `options` (required): `SegmentedOption[]`
- `value` (optional): `string`
- `defaultValue` (optional): `string`
- `onChange` (optional): `((value: string) => void)`
- `className` (optional): `string`
- `size` (optional): `"md" | "sm" | "lg"`
- `block` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Segmented } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Segmented
    defaultValue="day"
    options={[
      { value: 'day', label: 'Day' },
      { value: 'week', label: 'Week' },
      { value: 'month', label: 'Month' },
    ]}
  />
);
```

```tsx
import { Segmented, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space direction="vertical" size="middle">
    <Segmented size="sm" defaultValue="a" options={[{ value: 'a', label: 'sm' }, { value: 'b', label: 'Option' }]} />
    <Segmented size="md" defaultValue="a" options={[{ value: 'a', label: 'md' }, { value: 'b', label: 'Option' }]} />
    <Segmented size="lg" defaultValue="a" options={[{ value: 'a', label: 'lg' }, { value: 'b', label: 'Option' }]} />
  </Space>
);
```

## Statistic

Chinese name: 统计数值

Statistic component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Statistic } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/statistic | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/statistic

### Props

- `title` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `value` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `prefix` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `suffix` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `precision` (optional): `number`
- `size` (optional): `"md" | "sm" | "lg"`, default: `md`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Statistic } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <Statistic title="Active users" value={112893} />;
```

```tsx
import { Statistic, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space size="large">
    <Statistic title="Balance" value={1128.89} prefix="$" precision={2} />
    <Statistic title="Growth" value={12.5} suffix="%" precision={1} />
  </Space>
);
```

## Table

Chinese name: 表格

Table component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Table } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/table | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/table

### Props

- `columns` (required): `ColumnDef<T>[]`
- `data` (required): `T[]`
- `mobileFields` (optional): `(keyof T)[]`
- `loading` (optional): `boolean`
- `emptyText` (optional): `string`
- `onRowClick` (optional): `((row: T) => void)`
- `responsive` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Table } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Table
    columns={[
      { key: 'name', title: 'Name' },
      { key: 'age', title: 'Age' },
    ]}
    data={[
      { name: 'Alice', age: '20' },
      { name: 'Bob', age: '25' },
    ]}
  />
);
```

```tsx
import { Table } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Table
    columns={[
      { key: 'name', title: 'Name' },
      { key: 'role', title: 'Role' },
    ]}
    data={[]}
    emptyText="No members"
  />
);
```

## Tag

Chinese name: 标签

Tag component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Tag } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/tag | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/tag

### Props

- `onClose` (optional): `(() => void)`
- `color` (optional): `"neutral" | "primary" | "secondary" | "info" | "success" | "warning" | "error"`
- `variant` (optional): `"soft" | "outline" | "dash" | "solid" | "ghost"`
- `closable` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Tag, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space wrap>
    <Tag>Default</Tag>
    <Tag color="secondary">Secondary</Tag>
    <Tag color="info">Info</Tag>
    <Tag color="success">Success</Tag>
    <Tag color="warning">Warning</Tag>
    <Tag color="error">Error</Tag>
  </Space>
);
```

```tsx
import { Tag, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space wrap>
    <Tag color="primary" variant="soft">Soft</Tag>
    <Tag color="primary" variant="outline">Outline</Tag>
    <Tag color="primary" variant="dash">Dash</Tag>
    <Tag color="primary" variant="solid">Solid</Tag>
    <Tag color="primary" variant="ghost">Ghost</Tag>
  </Space>
);
```

## Timeline

Chinese name: 时间轴

Timeline component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Timeline } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/timeline | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/timeline

### Props

- `items` (required): `TimelineItem[]`
- `pending` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `mode` (optional): `"left" | "alternate"`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Timeline } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Timeline
    items={[
      { key: '1', children: 'Create project' },
      { key: '2', children: 'Ship release' },
      { key: '3', children: 'Keep iterating' },
    ]}
  />
);
```

```tsx
import { Timeline } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Timeline
    items={[
      { key: '1', label: '2024-01', children: 'Kickoff', color: 'primary' },
      { key: '2', label: '2024-03', children: 'Beta passed', color: 'success' },
      { key: '3', label: '2024-05', children: 'Risk note', color: 'warning' },
      { key: '4', label: '2024-06', children: 'Hotfix', color: 'error' },
      { key: '5', label: '2024-07', children: 'GA release', color: 'info' },
    ]}
  />
);
```

## Tooltip

Chinese name: 文字提示

Tooltip component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Tooltip } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/tooltip | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/tooltip

### Props

- `content` (required): `ReactNode`
- `color` (optional): `"neutral" | "primary" | "secondary" | "info" | "success" | "warning" | "error"`, default: `neutral`
- `placement` (optional): `"top" | "bottom" | "left" | "right"`, default: `top`
- `open` (optional): `boolean`
- `defaultOpen` (optional): `boolean`
- `onOpenChange` (optional): `((open: boolean) => void)`
- `className` (optional): `string`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Tooltip, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <div className="flex justify-center pt-12">
    <Tooltip content="Tip text">
      <Button>Hover</Button>
    </Tooltip>
  </div>
);
```

```tsx
import { Tooltip, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';

const cell = 'flex h-24 items-center justify-center';

export default () => (
  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-4">
    <div className={cell}>
      <Tooltip placement="top" content="Top" open>
        <Button size="sm">top</Button>
      </Tooltip>
    </div>
    <div className={cell}>
      <Tooltip placement="bottom" content="Bottom" open>
        <Button size="sm">bottom</Button>
      </Tooltip>
    </div>
    <div className={cell}>
      <Tooltip placement="left" content="Left" open>
        <Button size="sm">left</Button>
      </Tooltip>
    </div>
    <div className={cell}>
      <Tooltip placement="right" content="Right" open>
        <Button size="sm">right</Button>
      </Tooltip>
    </div>
  </div>
);
```

## Tree

Chinese name: 树形控件

Tree component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Tree } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/tree | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/tree

### Props

- `data` (required): `TreeNode[]`
- `defaultExpandedKeys` (optional): `string[]`, default: `[]`
- `expandedKeys` (optional): `string[]`
- `selectedKeys` (optional): `string[]`, default: `[]`
- `onSelect` (optional): `((keys: string[]) => void)`
- `onExpand` (optional): `((keys: string[]) => void)`
- `className` (optional): `string`
- `showLine` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Tree } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Tree
    data={[
      {
        key: '1',
        title: 'Docs',
        children: [
          { key: '1-1', title: 'Intro' },
          { key: '1-2', title: 'Quick start' },
        ],
      },
      {
        key: '2',
        title: 'Components',
        children: [{ key: '2-1', title: 'Button' }],
      },
    ]}
  />
);
```

```tsx
import { Tree } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Tree
    showLine
    defaultExpandedKeys={['1']}
    data={[
      {
        key: '1',
        title: 'Parent',
        children: [
          { key: '1-1', title: 'Child A' },
          { key: '1-2', title: 'Child B' },
        ],
      },
    ]}
  />
);
```

## NoticeBar

Chinese name: 通告栏

NoticeBar component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { NoticeBar } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/noticebar | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/noticebar

### Props

- `content` (required): `ReactNode`
- `leftIcon` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `closable` (optional): `boolean`
- `scrollable` (optional): `boolean`
- `onClose` (optional): `(() => void)`
- `color` (optional): `"primary" | "info" | "success" | "warning" | "error"`, default: `primary`

### Examples

```tsx
import { NoticeBar } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <NoticeBar content="This is a notice" />;
```

```tsx
import { NoticeBar, Stack } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Stack gap={3}>
    <NoticeBar color="primary" content="Default notice" />
    <NoticeBar color="info" content="Update available" />
    <NoticeBar color="success" content="Sync complete" />
    <NoticeBar color="warning" content="Please review the risks" />
    <NoticeBar color="error" content="Something went wrong. Try again later." />
  </Stack>
);
```

## Swiper

Chinese name: 滑块视图

Swiper component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Swiper } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/swiper | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/swiper

### Props

- `loop` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `autoplay` (optional): `boolean`
- `interval` (optional): `number`, default: `3000`
- `threshold` (optional): `number`, default: `40` — 滑动切换阈值（px），默认 40
- `showDots` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `showArrows` (optional): `boolean`
- `onChange` (optional): `((index: number) => void)`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Swiper } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Swiper>
    <div className="flex h-32 items-center justify-center bg-muted text-lg font-medium">Slide 1</div>
    <div className="flex h-32 items-center justify-center bg-primary/10 text-lg font-medium">Slide 2</div>
    <div className="flex h-32 items-center justify-center bg-muted/80 text-lg font-medium">Slide 3</div>
    <div className="flex h-32 items-center justify-center bg-primary/20 text-lg font-medium">Slide 4</div>
  </Swiper>
);
```

```tsx
import { Swiper } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Swiper showArrows>
    <div className="flex h-32 items-center justify-center bg-muted text-lg font-medium">Slide 1</div>
    <div className="flex h-32 items-center justify-center bg-primary/10 text-lg font-medium">Slide 2</div>
    <div className="flex h-32 items-center justify-center bg-muted/80 text-lg font-medium">Slide 3</div>
    <div className="flex h-32 items-center justify-center bg-primary/20 text-lg font-medium">Slide 4</div>
  </Swiper>
);
```

## Ellipsis

Chinese name: 文本省略

Ellipsis component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Data display / 数据展示

```ts
import { Ellipsis } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/ellipsis | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/ellipsis

### Props

- `content` (required): `ReactNode`
- `rows` (optional): `number`, default: `1`
- `expandable` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `expandText` (optional): `string`, default: `展开`
- `collapseText` (optional): `string`, default: `收起`
- `className` (optional): `string`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Ellipsis } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Ellipsis content="This is a long paragraph used to demonstrate text ellipsis: when content exceeds the container width, the overflow is truncated with an ellipsis so lists and cards stay readable." />
);
```

```tsx
import { Ellipsis } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Ellipsis
    rows={2}
    content="This long paragraph demonstrates multi-line ellipsis. Content is clamped to the given row count. Expand to read everything, then collapse again."
  />
);
```

## Alert

Chinese name: 警告提示

Alert component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Feedback / 反馈

```ts
import { Alert } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/alert | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/alert

### Props

- `title` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `description` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `icon` (optional): `ReactNode` — Custom icon. Pass `null` to hide the default status icon.
- `action` (optional): `ReactNode` — Trailing actions (e.g. buttons).
- `responsive` (optional): `boolean` — Vertical on narrow screens, horizontal from `sm` up.
Overrides `layout` when true.
- `closable` (optional): `boolean`
- `onClose` (optional): `(() => void)`
- `color` (optional): `"neutral" | "info" | "success" | "warning" | "error"`, default: `info`
- `variant` (optional): `"soft" | "outline" | "dash" | "solid"`, default: `soft`
- `layout` (optional): `"horizontal" | "vertical"`, default: `horizontal`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Alert } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Alert color="info" title="Info" description="This is an info message" />
);
```

```tsx
import { Alert, Stack } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Stack gap={3}>
    <Alert color="neutral" title="Neutral" description="Neutral tip" />
    <Alert color="info" title="Info" description="General tip" />
    <Alert color="success" title="Success" description="Done" />
    <Alert color="warning" title="Warning" description="Please check input" />
    <Alert color="error" title="Error" description="Submit failed" />
  </Stack>
);
```
