
## Drawer

Chinese name: 抽屉

Side / edge panel with the same chrome as Modal (no section borders, optional `closable`).

Category: Feedback / 反馈

```ts
import { Drawer } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/drawer | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/drawer

### Props

- `open` (required): `boolean`
- `onClose` (required): `() => void`
- `title` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `footer` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `maskClosable` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `closable` (optional): `boolean`
- `className` (optional): `string`
- `placement` (optional): `"right" | "left" | "top" | "bottom"`, default: `right`
- `size` (optional): `"md" | "sm" | "lg"`, default: `md`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Drawer, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>Open drawer</Button>
      <Drawer open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} title="Drawer" closable>
        Content
      </Drawer>
    </>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import { Drawer, Button, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [placement, setPlacement] = useState<'left' | 'right' | 'top' | 'bottom'>('right');
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <>
      <Space wrap>
        {(['left', 'right', 'top', 'bottom'] as const).map((p) => (
          <Button
            key={p}
            size="sm"
            variant={placement === p ? 'solid' : 'outline'}
            onClick={() => {
              setPlacement(p);
              setOpen(true);
            }}
          >
            {p}
          </Button>
        ))}
      </Space>
      <Drawer
        open={open}
        onClose={() => setOpen(false)}
        title={`placement=${placement}`}
        placement={placement}
        closable
      >
        Slides in from {placement}
      </Drawer>
    </>
  );
};
```

## Modal

Chinese name: 对话框

Desktop: centered dialog (daisyUI `modal-middle`). Mobile: bottom sheet when `responsive`.

Category: Feedback / 反馈

```ts
import { Modal } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/modal | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/modal

### Props

- `responsive` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true` — Switch to bottom sheet on mobile breakpoint.
- `open` (required): `boolean`
- `onClose` (required): `() => void`
- `title` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `footer` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `placement` (optional): `ModalPlacement`, default: `'middle'` — Desktop placement. Mobile adaptive path always uses bottom sheet.
- `size` (optional): `ModalSize`, default: `'md'`
- `closable` (optional): `boolean`, default: `false`
- `maskClosable` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `mobileFullscreen` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true` — Mobile sheet height. Ignored on desktop.
- `className` (optional): `string`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Modal, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>Open modal</Button>
      <Modal open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} title="Hello!">
        Press ESC or click the mask to close.
      </Modal>
    </>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import { Modal, Button, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>Confirm</Button>
      <Modal
        open={open}
        onClose={() => setOpen(false)}
        title="Confirm delete"
        closable
        footer={
          <Space>
            <Button color="neutral" variant="ghost" onClick={() => setOpen(false)}>
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button color="error" onClick={() => setOpen(false)}>
              Delete
            </Button>
          </Space>
        }
      >
        Delete this record?
      </Modal>
    </>
  );
};
```

## Notification

Chinese name: 通知提醒

Notification component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Feedback / 反馈

```ts
import { Notification } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/notification | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/notification

### Props

- `title` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `description` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `open` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `onClose` (optional): `(() => void)`
- `placement` (optional): `NotificationPlacement`, default: `topRight`
- `color` (optional): `NotificationColor`, default: `info`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Notification, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>Show notification</Button>
      <Notification
        open={open}
        onClose={() => setOpen(false)}
        title="Notice"
        description="This is a notification message"
      />
    </>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import { Notification, Button, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [color, setColor] = useState(null);
  return (
    <>
      <Space wrap>
        <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setColor('info')}>info</Button>
        <Button variant="soft" onClick={() => setColor('success')}>success</Button>
        <Button color="secondary" onClick={() => setColor('warning')}>warning</Button>
        <Button color="error" onClick={() => setColor('error')}>error</Button>
      </Space>
      {color ? (
        <Notification
          color={color}
          open
          onClose={() => setColor(null)}
          title={color}
          description={`${color} notification`}
        />
      ) : null}
    </>
  );
};
```

## Popconfirm

Chinese name: 气泡确认

Popconfirm component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Feedback / 反馈

```ts
import { Popconfirm } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/popconfirm | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/popconfirm

### Props

- `title` (required): `ReactNode`
- `description` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `onConfirm` (optional): `(() => void)`
- `onCancel` (optional): `(() => void)`
- `confirmText` (optional): `string`, default: `确定`
- `cancelText` (optional): `string`, default: `取消`
- `okType` (optional): `"primary" | "error"`, default: `primary`
- `disabled` (optional): `boolean`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Popconfirm, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Popconfirm title="Delete this item?" onConfirm={() => {}}>
    <Button color="error">Delete</Button>
  </Popconfirm>
);
```

```tsx
import { Popconfirm, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Popconfirm
    title="Delete record"
    description="This cannot be undone. Proceed carefully."
    onConfirm={() => {}}
  >
    <Button variant="outline">With description</Button>
  </Popconfirm>
);
```

## Progress

Chinese name: 进度条

Progress component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Feedback / 反馈

```ts
import { Progress } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/progress | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/progress

### Props

- `percent` (optional): `number`
- `showInfo` (optional): `boolean`
- `strokeColor` (optional): `string`
- `color` (optional): `"primary" | "info" | "success" | "warning" | "error"`, default: `primary`
- `size` (optional): `"md" | "sm" | "lg"`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Progress } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <Progress percent={60} />;
```

```tsx
import { Progress, Stack } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Stack gap={4}>
    <Progress percent={30} showInfo />
    <Progress percent={70} color="success" showInfo />
    <Progress percent={55} color="warning" showInfo />
    <Progress percent={50} color="error" showInfo />
    <Progress percent={40} color="info" showInfo />
  </Stack>
);
```

## Result

Chinese name: 结果

Result component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Feedback / 反馈

```ts
import { Result } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/result | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/result

### Props

- `title` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `subTitle` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `icon` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `extra` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `status` (optional): `"info" | "success" | "error" | "warning" | "404" | "403" | "500"`, default: `info`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Result, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Result status="success" title="Submitted" extra={<Button>Back</Button>} />
);
```

```tsx
import { Result, Stack } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Stack gap={6}>
    <Result status="success" title="Success" subTitle="Operation completed" />
    <Result status="error" title="Error" subTitle="Please try again" />
    <Result status="info" title="Info" subTitle="Check for updates" />
    <Result status="warning" title="Warning" subTitle="Confirm before continue" />
    <Result status="404" title="Not found" subTitle="Check the URL" />
    <Result status="403" title="Forbidden" subTitle="Contact an admin" />
    <Result status="500" title="Server error" subTitle="Try again later" />
  </Stack>
);
```

## Skeleton

Chinese name: 骨架屏

Skeleton component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Feedback / 反馈

```ts
import { Skeleton } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/skeleton | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/skeleton

### Props

- `width` (optional): `string | number`
- `height` (optional): `string | number`
- `active` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `variant` (optional): `"text" | "circular" | "rectangular"`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Skeleton } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <div className="space-y-2">
    <Skeleton />
    <Skeleton width="80%" />
    <Skeleton width="60%" />
  </div>
);
```

```tsx
import { Skeleton, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space align="center" size="middle">
    <Skeleton variant="text" width={160} />
    <Skeleton variant="circular" width={40} height={40} />
    <Skeleton variant="rectangular" width={120} height={64} />
  </Space>
);
```

## Spin

Chinese name: 加载中

Spin component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Feedback / 反馈

```ts
import { Spin } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/spin | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/spin

### Props

- `spinning` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `tip` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `indicator` (optional): `SpinnerStyle`, default: `spinner` — Loading indicator style.
- `color` (optional): `ControlColor`, default: `primary`
- `size` (optional): `"md" | "sm" | "lg"`, default: `md`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Spin } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <Spin tip="Loading..." />;
```

```tsx
import { Spin, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space align="center" size="large">
    <Spin size="sm" tip="sm" />
    <Spin size="md" tip="md" />
    <Spin size="lg" tip="lg" />
  </Space>
);
```

## Toast

Chinese name: 轻提示

Toast component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Feedback / 反馈

```ts
import { Toast } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/toast | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/toast

### Examples

```tsx
import { Button, toast } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Button onClick={() => toast('Default toast')}>Show toast</Button>
);
```

```tsx
import { Button, Space, toast } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Space wrap>
    <Button onClick={() => toast('Default')}>default</Button>
    <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => toast.info('Info toast')}>info</Button>
    <Button variant="soft" onClick={() => toast.success('Success')}>success</Button>
    <Button color="secondary" onClick={() => toast.warning('Warning')}>warning</Button>
    <Button color="error" onClick={() => toast.error('Error')}>error</Button>
  </Space>
);
```

## Popup

Chinese name: 弹出层

Compact centered dialog — same chrome as Modal, default `size="sm"`.

Category: Feedback / 反馈

```ts
import { Popup } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/popup | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/popup

### Props

- `open` (required): `boolean`
- `onClose` (required): `() => void`
- `title` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `footer` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `size` (optional): `ModalSize`, default: `sm` — Compact centered dialog (defaults to `sm`).
- `closable` (optional): `boolean` — Corner close button.
- `maskClosable` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true` — Close when clicking the mask.
- `className` (optional): `string`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Popup, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>Open popup</Button>
      <Popup open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} title="Notice">
        Centered popup content.
      </Popup>
    </>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import { Popup, Button, Space } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>With footer</Button>
      <Popup
        open={open}
        onClose={() => setOpen(false)}
        title="Confirm"
        closable
        footer={
          <Space>
            <Button color="neutral" variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setOpen(false)}>
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button color="primary" size="sm" onClick={() => setOpen(false)}>
              OK
            </Button>
          </Space>
        }
      >
        Continue?
      </Popup>
    </>
  );
};
```

## ActionSheet

Chinese name: 动作面板

ActionSheet component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Feedback / 反馈

```ts
import { ActionSheet } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/actionsheet | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/actionsheet

### Props

- `open` (required): `boolean`
- `onClose` (required): `() => void`
- `title` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `description` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `actions` (required): `ActionSheetAction[]`
- `cancelText` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `closeOnAction` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `maskClosable` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`

### Examples

```tsx
import { ActionSheet, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>Open</Button>
      <ActionSheet
        open={open}
        onClose={() => setOpen(false)}
        actions={[
          { key: '1', text: 'Option 1' },
          { key: '2', text: 'Option 2' },
        ]}
      />
    </>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import { ActionSheet, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>More</Button>
      <ActionSheet
        open={open}
        onClose={() => setOpen(false)}
        title="Share to"
        description="Pick a platform"
        actions={[
          { key: 'wechat', text: 'WeChat' },
          { key: 'link', text: 'Copy link' },
        ]}
      />
    </>
  );
};
```

## Loading

Chinese name: 加载

Loading component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Feedback / 反馈

```ts
import { Loading } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/loading | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/loading

### Props

- `open` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `tip` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `fullscreen` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `className` (optional): `string`
- `indicator` (optional): `SpinnerStyle`, default: `spinner`
- `color` (optional): `ControlColor`, default: `primary`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Loading, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={() => {
          setOpen(true);
          setTimeout(() => setOpen(false), 1500);
        }}
      >
        Fullscreen loading
      </Button>
      <Loading open={open} tip="Loading..." />
    </>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import { Loading } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <Loading open fullscreen={false} tip="Please wait" />;
```

## Mask

Chinese name: 背景蒙层

Mask component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Feedback / 反馈

```ts
import { Mask } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/mask | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/mask

### Props

- `visible` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `zIndex` (optional): `number`, default: `50`
- `open` (optional): `boolean`
- `onClick` (optional): `(() => void)`
- `durationMs` (optional): `number` — Exit animation duration in ms (kept for API compat; Motion uses seconds).
- `ref` (optional): `Ref<HTMLDivElement>`
- `key` (optional): `Key | null`
- `defaultChecked` (optional): `boolean`
- `defaultValue` (optional): `string | number | readonly string[]`
- `suppressContentEditableWarning` (optional): `boolean`
- `suppressHydrationWarning` (optional): `boolean`
- `accessKey` (optional): `string`
- `autoCapitalize` (optional): `"off" | "none" | "on" | "sentences" | "words" | "characters" | (string & {})`
- `autoFocus` (optional): `boolean`
- `className` (optional): `string`
- `contentEditable` (optional): `"inherit" | Booleanish | "plaintext-only"`
- `contextMenu` (optional): `string`
- `dir` (optional): `string`
- `draggable` (optional): `Booleanish`
- `enterKeyHint` (optional): `"search" | "enter" | "done" | "go" | "next" | "previous" | "send"`
- `hidden` (optional): `boolean`
- `id` (optional): `string`
- `lang` (optional): `string`
- `nonce` (optional): `string`
- `slot` (optional): `string`
- `spellCheck` (optional): `Booleanish`
- `tabIndex` (optional): `number`
- `title` (optional): `string`
- `translate` (optional): `"yes" | "no"`
- `radioGroup` (optional): `string`
- `role` (optional): `AriaRole`
- `about` (optional): `string`
- `content` (optional): `string`
- `datatype` (optional): `string`
- `inlist` (optional): `any`
- `prefix` (optional): `string`
- `property` (optional): `string`
- `rel` (optional): `string`
- `resource` (optional): `string`
- `rev` (optional): `string`
- `typeof` (optional): `string`
- `vocab` (optional): `string`
- `autoCorrect` (optional): `string`
- `autoSave` (optional): `string`
- `color` (optional): `string`
- `itemProp` (optional): `string`
- `itemScope` (optional): `boolean`
- `itemType` (optional): `string`
- `itemID` (optional): `string`
- `itemRef` (optional): `string`
- `results` (optional): `number`
- `security` (optional): `string`
- `unselectable` (optional): `"off" | "on"`
- `popover` (optional): `"" | "auto" | "manual" | "hint"`
- `popoverTargetAction` (optional): `"toggle" | "show" | "hide"`
- `popoverTarget` (optional): `string`
- `inert` (optional): `boolean`
- `inputMode` (optional): `"search" | "none" | "text" | "tel" | "url" | "email" | "numeric" | "decimal"`
- `is` (optional): `string`
- `exportparts` (optional): `string`
- `part` (optional): `string`
- `aria-activedescendant` (optional): `string`
- `aria-atomic` (optional): `Booleanish`
- `aria-autocomplete` (optional): `"none" | "list" | "inline" | "both"`
- `aria-braillelabel` (optional): `string`
- `aria-brailleroledescription` (optional): `string`
- `aria-busy` (optional): `Booleanish`
- `aria-checked` (optional): `boolean | "true" | "false" | "mixed"`
- `aria-colcount` (optional): `number`
- `aria-colindex` (optional): `number`
- `aria-colindextext` (optional): `string`
- `aria-colspan` (optional): `number`
- `aria-controls` (optional): `string`
- `aria-current` (optional): `boolean | "page" | "true" | "false" | "step" | "location" | "date" | "time"`
- `aria-describedby` (optional): `string`
- `aria-description` (optional): `string`
- `aria-details` (optional): `string`
- `aria-disabled` (optional): `Booleanish`
- `aria-dropeffect` (optional): `"link" | "none" | "copy" | "execute" | "move" | "popup"`
- `aria-errormessage` (optional): `string`
- `aria-expanded` (optional): `Booleanish`
- `aria-flowto` (optional): `string`
- `aria-grabbed` (optional): `Booleanish`
- `aria-haspopup` (optional): `boolean | "grid" | "true" | "false" | "dialog" | "listbox" | "menu" | "tree"`
- `aria-hidden` (optional): `Booleanish`
- `aria-invalid` (optional): `boolean | "true" | "false" | "grammar" | "spelling"`
- `aria-keyshortcuts` (optional): `string`
- `aria-label` (optional): `string`
- `aria-labelledby` (optional): `string`
- `aria-level` (optional): `number`
- `aria-live` (optional): `"off" | "assertive" | "polite"`
- `aria-modal` (optional): `Booleanish`
- `aria-multiline` (optional): `Booleanish`
- `aria-multiselectable` (optional): `Booleanish`
- `aria-orientation` (optional): `"horizontal" | "vertical"`
- `aria-owns` (optional): `string`
- `aria-placeholder` (optional): `string`
- `aria-posinset` (optional): `number`
- `aria-pressed` (optional): `boolean | "true" | "false" | "mixed"`
- `aria-readonly` (optional): `Booleanish`
- `aria-relevant` (optional): `"all" | "text" | "additions" | "additions removals" | "additions text" | "removals" | "removals additions" | "removals text" | "text additions" | "text removals"`
- `aria-required` (optional): `Booleanish`
- `aria-roledescription` (optional): `string`
- `aria-rowcount` (optional): `number`
- `aria-rowindex` (optional): `number`
- `aria-rowindextext` (optional): `string`
- `aria-rowspan` (optional): `number`
- `aria-selected` (optional): `Booleanish`
- `aria-setsize` (optional): `number`
- `aria-sort` (optional): `"none" | "ascending" | "descending" | "other"`
- `aria-valuemax` (optional): `number`
- `aria-valuemin` (optional): `number`
- `aria-valuenow` (optional): `number`
- `aria-valuetext` (optional): `string`
- `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` (optional): `{ __html: string | TrustedHTML; }`
- `onCopy` (optional): `ClipboardEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onCopyCapture` (optional): `ClipboardEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onCut` (optional): `ClipboardEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onCutCapture` (optional): `ClipboardEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPaste` (optional): `ClipboardEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPasteCapture` (optional): `ClipboardEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onCompositionEnd` (optional): `CompositionEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onCompositionEndCapture` (optional): `CompositionEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onCompositionStart` (optional): `CompositionEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onCompositionStartCapture` (optional): `CompositionEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onCompositionUpdate` (optional): `CompositionEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onCompositionUpdateCapture` (optional): `CompositionEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onFocus` (optional): `FocusEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onFocusCapture` (optional): `FocusEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onBlur` (optional): `FocusEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onBlurCapture` (optional): `FocusEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onChange` (optional): `ChangeEventHandler<HTMLDivElement, Element>`
- `onChangeCapture` (optional): `ChangeEventHandler<HTMLDivElement, Element>`
- `onBeforeInput` (optional): `InputEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onBeforeInputCapture` (optional): `InputEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onInput` (optional): `InputEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onInputCapture` (optional): `InputEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onReset` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onResetCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onSubmit` (optional): `SubmitEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onSubmitCapture` (optional): `SubmitEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onInvalid` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onInvalidCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onLoad` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onLoadCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onError` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onErrorCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onKeyDown` (optional): `KeyboardEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onKeyDownCapture` (optional): `KeyboardEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onKeyPress` (optional): `KeyboardEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onKeyPressCapture` (optional): `KeyboardEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onKeyUp` (optional): `KeyboardEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onKeyUpCapture` (optional): `KeyboardEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onAbort` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onAbortCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onCanPlay` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onCanPlayCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onCanPlayThrough` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onCanPlayThroughCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onDurationChange` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onDurationChangeCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onEmptied` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onEmptiedCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onEncrypted` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onEncryptedCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onEnded` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onEndedCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onLoadedData` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onLoadedDataCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onLoadedMetadata` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onLoadedMetadataCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onLoadStart` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onLoadStartCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPause` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPauseCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPlay` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPlayCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPlaying` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPlayingCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onProgress` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onProgressCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onRateChange` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onRateChangeCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onSeeked` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onSeekedCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onSeeking` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onSeekingCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onStalled` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onStalledCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onSuspend` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onSuspendCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTimeUpdate` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTimeUpdateCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onVolumeChange` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onVolumeChangeCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onWaiting` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onWaitingCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onAuxClick` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onAuxClickCapture` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onClickCapture` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onContextMenu` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onContextMenuCapture` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onDoubleClick` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onDoubleClickCapture` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onDragCapture` (optional): `DragEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onDragEndCapture` (optional): `DragEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onDragEnter` (optional): `DragEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onDragEnterCapture` (optional): `DragEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onDragExit` (optional): `DragEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onDragExitCapture` (optional): `DragEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onDragLeave` (optional): `DragEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onDragLeaveCapture` (optional): `DragEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onDragOver` (optional): `DragEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onDragOverCapture` (optional): `DragEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onDragStartCapture` (optional): `DragEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onDrop` (optional): `DragEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onDropCapture` (optional): `DragEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onMouseDown` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onMouseDownCapture` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onMouseEnter` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onMouseLeave` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onMouseMove` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onMouseMoveCapture` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onMouseOut` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onMouseOutCapture` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onMouseOver` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onMouseOverCapture` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onMouseUp` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onMouseUpCapture` (optional): `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onSelect` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onSelectCapture` (optional): `ReactEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTouchCancel` (optional): `TouchEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTouchCancelCapture` (optional): `TouchEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTouchEnd` (optional): `TouchEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTouchEndCapture` (optional): `TouchEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTouchMove` (optional): `TouchEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTouchMoveCapture` (optional): `TouchEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTouchStart` (optional): `TouchEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTouchStartCapture` (optional): `TouchEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPointerDown` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPointerDownCapture` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPointerMove` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPointerMoveCapture` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPointerUp` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPointerUpCapture` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPointerCancel` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPointerCancelCapture` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPointerEnter` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPointerLeave` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPointerOver` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPointerOverCapture` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPointerOut` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onPointerOutCapture` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onGotPointerCapture` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onGotPointerCaptureCapture` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onLostPointerCapture` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onLostPointerCaptureCapture` (optional): `PointerEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onScroll` (optional): `UIEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onScrollCapture` (optional): `UIEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onScrollEnd` (optional): `UIEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onScrollEndCapture` (optional): `UIEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onWheel` (optional): `WheelEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onWheelCapture` (optional): `WheelEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onAnimationStartCapture` (optional): `AnimationEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onAnimationEnd` (optional): `AnimationEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onAnimationEndCapture` (optional): `AnimationEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onAnimationIteration` (optional): `AnimationEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onAnimationIterationCapture` (optional): `AnimationEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onToggle` (optional): `ToggleEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onBeforeToggle` (optional): `ToggleEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTransitionCancel` (optional): `TransitionEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTransitionCancelCapture` (optional): `TransitionEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTransitionEnd` (optional): `TransitionEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTransitionEndCapture` (optional): `TransitionEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTransitionRun` (optional): `TransitionEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTransitionRunCapture` (optional): `TransitionEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTransitionStart` (optional): `TransitionEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`
- `onTransitionStartCapture` (optional): `TransitionEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Mask, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>Show mask</Button>
      <Mask open={open} onClick={() => setOpen(false)} />
    </>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import { Mask, Button, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>Mask with content</Button>
      <Mask open={open} zIndex={80} onClick={() => setOpen(false)}>
        <div
          className="absolute left-1/2 top-1/2 w-64 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 rounded-box bg-surface p-4 shadow-float"
          onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
        >
          <Text className="mb-3 block font-medium">Overlay content</Text>
          <Text muted size="sm" className="mb-4 block">
            Click the mask to close, or use the button below.
          </Text>
          <Button size="sm" onClick={() => setOpen(false)}>Close</Button>
        </div>
      </Mask>
    </>
  );
};
```

## Watermark

Chinese name: 水印

Watermark component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Feedback / 反馈

```ts
import { Watermark } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/watermark | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/watermark

### Props

- `content` (optional): `ReactNode`, default: `Koi UI`
- `gap` (optional): `[number, number]`, default: `[100, 100]`
- `rotate` (optional): `number`, default: `-22`
- `fontSize` (optional): `number`, default: `14`
- `fontColor` (optional): `string`, default: `rgba(0,0,0,0.08)`
- `zIndex` (optional): `number`, default: `9`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Watermark } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Watermark content="Koi UI">
    <div className="flex h-32 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-border">
      Watermark area
    </div>
  </Watermark>
);
```

```tsx
import { Watermark } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Watermark content="Confidential" gap={[80, 80]} rotate={-30}>
    <div className="flex h-40 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-border">
      Tune gap and rotate
    </div>
  </Watermark>
);
```

## BackTop

Chinese name: 回到顶部

BackTop component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Other / 其他

```ts
import { BackTop } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/backtop | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/backtop

### Props

- `visibilityHeight` (optional): `number`, default: `400`
- `target` (optional): `(() => HTMLElement | Window | null)`

### Examples

```tsx
import { BackTop, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <div className="relative space-y-2 pb-8 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
    <Text className="font-medium text-surface-foreground">Scroll down to reveal BackTop</Text>
    {Array.from({ length: 50 }, (_, i) => (
      <p key={i}>Row {i + 1}</p>
    ))}
    <BackTop visibilityHeight={120} />
  </div>
);
```

```tsx
import { BackTop, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <div className="relative space-y-2 pb-8 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
    <Text className="font-medium text-surface-foreground">visibilityHeight=40 — appears after a short scroll</Text>
    {Array.from({ length: 50 }, (_, i) => (
      <p key={i}>Row {i + 1}</p>
    ))}
    <BackTop visibilityHeight={40} />
  </div>
);
```

## FloatButton

Chinese name: 悬浮按钮

FloatButton component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Other / 其他

```ts
import { FloatButton } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/floatbutton | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/floatbutton

### Props

- `icon` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `description` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `color` (optional): `"primary" | "secondary" | "neutral"`
- `size` (optional): `"md" | "sm" | "lg"`
- `placement` (optional): `"bottom-right" | "bottom-left" | "top-right" | "top-left"`

### Examples

```tsx
import { FloatButton, Icon } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <FloatButton
    icon={<Icon name="plus" />}
    description="Create"
  />
);
```

```tsx
import { FloatButton, Icon } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <>
    <FloatButton
      color="primary"
      placement="bottom-right"
      icon={<Icon name="plus" />}
      description="Primary"
    />
    <FloatButton
      color="secondary"
      placement="bottom-left"
      icon={<Icon name="search" />}
      description="Secondary"
    />
  </>
);
```

## PullToRefresh

Chinese name: 下拉刷新

PullToRefresh component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Other / 其他

```ts
import { PullToRefresh } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/pulltorefresh | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/pulltorefresh

### Props

- `onRefresh` (required): `() => void | Promise<void>`
- `pullingText` (optional): `ReactNode`, default: `下拉刷新`
- `releaseText` (optional): `ReactNode`, default: `释放刷新`
- `refreshingText` (optional): `ReactNode`, default: `刷新中...`
- `threshold` (optional): `number`, default: `60`

### Examples

```tsx
import { PullToRefresh, List, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [items, setItems] = useState([
    { key: '1', title: 'Item 1' },
    { key: '2', title: 'Item 2' },
    { key: '3', title: 'Item 3' },
  ]);
  return (
    <div className="space-y-2">
      <Text muted size="sm">Pull down from the top of the list to refresh</Text>
      <PullToRefresh
        className="h-64 rounded-md border border-border"
        onRefresh={async () => {
          await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, 800));
          setItems((prev) => [
            { key: String(Date.now()), title: `Refreshed at ${new Date().toLocaleTimeString()}` },
            ...prev,
          ]);
        }}
      >
        <List items={items} />
      </PullToRefresh>
    </div>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import { PullToRefresh, List } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <PullToRefresh
    className="h-64 rounded-md border border-border"
    threshold={80}
    pullingText="Keep pulling…"
    releaseText="Release to refresh"
    refreshingText="Refreshing…"
    onRefresh={async () => {
      await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, 1000));
    }}
  >
    <List
      items={[
        { key: '1', title: 'threshold=80' },
        { key: '2', title: 'Custom status texts' },
        { key: '3', title: 'Item 3' },
      ]}
    />
  </PullToRefresh>
);
```

## Footer

Chinese name: 页脚

Footer component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Other / 其他

```ts
import { Footer } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/footer | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/footer

### Props

- `copyright` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `links` (optional): `{ key: string; label: ReactNode; href?: string; }[]`

### Examples

```tsx
import { Footer } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => <Footer>© 2026 Koi UI</Footer>;
```

```tsx
import { Footer } from '@koi-ui/core';
export default () => (
  <Footer
    links={[
      { key: 'docs', label: 'Docs', href: '#' },
      { key: 'github', label: 'GitHub', href: '#' },
      { key: 'changelog', label: 'Changelog', href: '#' },
    ]}
    copyright="© 2026 Koi UI. All rights reserved."
  />
);
```

## FloatingPanel

Chinese name: 浮动面板

FloatingPanel component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Other / 其他

```ts
import { FloatingPanel } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/floatingpanel | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/floatingpanel

### Props

- `open` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`
- `onClose` (optional): `(() => void)`
- `title` (optional): `ReactNode`
- `anchors` (optional): `number[]`, default: `[0.4, 0.7]`
- `defaultAnchor` (optional): `number`, default: `0.4`
- `showOverlay` (optional): `boolean`, default: `true`

### Examples

```tsx
import { FloatingPanel, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>Open panel</Button>
      <FloatingPanel open={open} onClose={() => setOpen(false)} title="Panel title">
        Drag the handle to resize. Tap the mask to close.
      </FloatingPanel>
    </>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import { FloatingPanel, Button } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={() => setOpen(true)}>Multiple anchors</Button>
      <FloatingPanel
        open={open}
        onClose={() => setOpen(false)}
        title="Anchors"
        anchors={[0.3, 0.5, 0.8]}
        defaultAnchor={0.5}
      >
        Snaps to the nearest viewport height ratio on release.
      </FloatingPanel>
    </>
  );
};
```

## InfiniteScroll

Chinese name: 无限滚动

InfiniteScroll component from @koi-ui/core

Category: Other / 其他

```ts
import { InfiniteScroll } from '@koi-ui/core';
```

Docs: https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/en/components/infinitescroll | https://icepepsicola.github.io/koi-ui/zh/components/infinitescroll

### Props

- `loadMore` (required): `() => void | Promise<void>`
- `hasMore` (required): `boolean`
- `threshold` (optional): `number`, default: `100`
- `loadingText` (optional): `ReactNode`, default: `加载中...`
- `endText` (optional): `ReactNode`, default: `没有更多了`

### Examples

```tsx
import { InfiniteScroll, List, Text } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [items, setItems] = useState(
    Array.from({ length: 8 }, (_, i) => ({ key: String(i), title: `Item ${i + 1}` })),
  );
  const [hasMore, setHasMore] = useState(true);
  return (
    <div className="space-y-2">
      <Text muted size="sm">Scroll to the bottom to load more</Text>
      <InfiniteScroll
        className="h-64 rounded-md border border-border"
        hasMore={hasMore}
        loadMore={async () => {
          await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, 600));
          setItems((prev) => {
            const next = [
              ...prev,
              ...Array.from({ length: 5 }, (_, i) => ({
                key: String(prev.length + i),
                title: `Item ${prev.length + i + 1}`,
              })),
            ];
            if (next.length >= 25) setHasMore(false);
            return next;
          });
        }}
      >
        <List items={items} />
      </InfiniteScroll>
    </div>
  );
};
```

```tsx
import { InfiniteScroll, List } from '@koi-ui/core';
import { useState } from 'react';
export default () => {
  const [items, setItems] = useState(
    Array.from({ length: 6 }, (_, i) => ({ key: String(i), title: `Row ${i + 1}` })),
  );
  const [hasMore, setHasMore] = useState(true);
  return (
    <InfiniteScroll
      className="h-64 rounded-md border border-border"
      hasMore={hasMore}
      loadingText="Loading more…"
      endText="That's all"
      loadMore={async () => {
        await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, 500));
        setItems((prev) => {
          const next = [
            ...prev,
            ...Array.from({ length: 4 }, (_, i) => ({
              key: String(prev.length + i),
              title: `Row ${prev.length + i + 1}`,
            })),
          ];
          if (next.length >= 18) setHasMore(false);
          return next;
        });
      }}
    >
      <List items={items} />
    </InfiniteScroll>
  );
};
```
